Subscribe ↗
Brand Identity Issue 01

A voice
that doesn't
flinch.

Follow or Bounce is a publication built on a single editorial wager: ideas either earn their place, or they don't. Everything here — the type, the colour, the cadence — exists to serve that premise.

Visual Language
01

Logotype

Follow.Or.Bounce
Follow.Or.Bounce
FOLLOW.OR.BOUNCE
Typeface Bebas Neue
Weight 400 Regular
Tracking 0.12em
Accent Rust #C0390B
Usage: The two rust dots are the only permitted colour accent in the wordmark. Never stretch, recolour the letterforms, or remove the dots.
Colour System
02

Colour

Ink #0D0C0A Primary text, borders, UI fills
Paper #F4F0E6 Page background, reversed text
Rust #C0390B Accent, emphasis, logotype dots
Slate #3A3D44 Body copy, secondary text
Fog #B8B3A8 Captions, metadata, placeholders
Typography
03

Type Scale

Signal over noise.
DM Serif Display Display / Hero clamp(3rem, 8vw, 7rem)
Technology & Law
Bebas Neue Section Heading 1.6–2.5rem
A publication built on the premise that ideas either earn their place, or they don't. We write for readers who want substance over speed.
DM Mono 400 Body / UI 0.78–0.85rem
EST. 2024 / ISSUE 01 / TECHNOLOGY
DM Mono 400 Labels / Metadata 0.6–0.65rem / 0.2–0.28em tracking
Editorial Voice
04

Voice & Tone

We are
  • Direct without being blunt
  • Informed without being academic
  • Critical without being cynical
  • Precise without being cold
  • Opinionated with receipts
We are not
  • Breaking news
  • Hot takes without context
  • Cheerleaders for any platform
  • Vague or hedging
  • Writing for algorithms
"If a piece doesn't earn its place in your inbox,
it doesn't get published." — Editorial principle
Grid & Layout
05

Grid System

All layouts are built on a 1px ink border grid. Borders define structure — never shadows, never background fills. Every cell in the grid earns its space.

Primary
Secondary
Meta
Accent
Body
Rule
Max width 72rem
Padding 2.5rem (desktop) / 1.2rem (mobile)
Border 1px solid #0D0C0A
Hover fill translateY sweep, 280ms cubic-bezier
Downloads
06

Press & Assets

For editorial enquiries, press coverage, or licensing requests, contact us directly.

Contact → Please include your publication and intended use.
